narrative:
East Liverpool City has 4,989 registered voters, with 69.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.5 percentage points.
